reviews.comment:
el personal brinda buen servicio, pero habría que aumentar personal, ya que no dan abasto y las colas de autos son largas. se pierde mucho tiempo

The staff provides good service, but they need more staff, as they can't keep up and the lines are long. A lot of time is wasted.
